hero.description: No buzzwords, just code. I solve complex problems with clean architectures and leave behind systems that actually work, not technical debt.

about.title: BUSINESS MEETS TECHNOLOGY
about.text: I don't just write code; I build digital assets. Combining the 'Big Picture' mindset of MIS with modern tech stacks like Supabase & Next.js, I design scalable systems where business logic meets development excellence. No legacy code, just shipping.

scout.title: Scout Leader
scout.desc: Field leadership, crisis decision-making, and team coordination under real-world pressure — long before writing a single line of code.

igl.title: In-Game Leader
igl.desc: Calling strategies, reading enemy rotations, and making split-second decisions under elimination pressure. Pressure is just another build environment.

analyze.title: Analyze First
analyze.text: I grab a pen before I touch the keyboard. Coding without understanding the problem is just generating bugs.

clean.title: Clean Architecture
clean.text: I respect the next developer. No spaghetti code, just modular, readable, and scalable structures.

optimize.title: Optimization
optimize.text: Working isn't enough; it must fly. I ruthlessly eliminate unnecessary queries and re-renders.

project_desc.vrocks: Vintage aesthetics meets modern tech. Fast, nostalgic, but powerful under the hood.
project_desc.united: JNR VIP Transfer — a premium platform offering luxury vehicle rental and VIP transfer services tailored for both corporate and individual clients.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.description: Feel free to reach out for projects or collaboration.
Contact.message_placeholder: Hi, I'd like to discuss a project with you...

data.response: System active. I am Terminal. vr0cks is probably building an ERP system architecture or busy with AI integration right now. If you have anything you want me to pass on, I'm here. Type 'help' to see commands.

Main stack: Next.js 15 (App Router), TypeScript, Python, Tailwind, and React Native. I don't just write standard code; I build end-to-end ERP systems, integrate AI agents, and deploy projects to production. No spaghetti code, only perfectly running, scalable systems.

My difference: I am not an ordinary 'task finisher'. I currently manage the IT Department of a company and concurrently develop AI-powered luxury identity verification systems. Thanks to my MIS education, I map technical architecture directly to business goals. I bring your company not just code, but money-making automations and ROI-driven solutions.

I study Management Information Systems (MIS) at THK University. This department taught me not just to write code, but to integrate software into the heart of the business world. While building technical architecture, I structure the commercial logic with the same clarity.

Outside of work? I have a 14-year scouting history, 8 years as a goalkeeper, and I play American Football. I have no business with anything that doesn't require discipline and strategy. I am a team player, but I also know very well how to shoulder a project and finish it alone when necessary.
You can inquire about these topics: 'tech', 'education', 'hobbies', 'why you', or 'contact'.
If you have a serious project or business offer, you can reach me via ahmetcanli1943@gmail.com or LinkedIn. I am always ready for visionary work.

AboutPage.title: Hey, I'm Yiğit 👋
AboutPage.intro: I'm a developer who genuinely enjoys turning complex problems into clean, working solutions. My journey started with curiosity about how things work – and honestly, that curiosity hasn't faded one bit. I studied Management Information Systems, which gave me the superpower of understanding both the code AND the business behind it.

education.title: Where I Learned the Craft
education.desc: THK University taught me that great software isn't just about writing code – it's about understanding why you're writing it. Database design, system analysis, agile workflows... these became my building blocks. But the real education? That happens every day, with every bug I squash and every feature I ship.

vision.title: What I Believe In
vision.clean_code: I write code for the next developer (often future-me). Clean, readable, and maintainable – because nobody likes inheriting a mess.
vision.learning: Tech moves fast, and I love that. There's always a new tool to explore, a better way to solve a problem. That constant learning? It's not a burden, it's the fun part.

leadership.title: Leadership & Decision-Making
leadership.desc: Software is not just architecture — it's making fast decisions under pressure. Whether leading scouts through a field crisis or calling strategies as an IGL in a 5v5 match, I've learned that great teams don't happen by accident. They're built with communication, trust, and clarity. I bring that same mindset to every codebase and every sprint.
